Package it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI

Class ChooseStarterController

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.GUIController
it.polimi.ingsfw.ingsfwproject.View.GUI.ChooseStarterController
All Implemented Interfaces:
javafx.fxml.Initializable
public class ChooseStarterController extends GUIController implements javafx.fxml.Initializable
The controller of the scene where the starter card is chosen

    Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.

    Initializes the controller upon loading.

    sendBack(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent mouseEvent)
    Sends a message to play the back side of the starter card in the player's hand and handles the card selection.
    void

    Sends a message to play the front side of the starter card in the player's hand and handles the card selection.

    Sends a chat message based on the user's input and updates the chat.

    Sets the GUI view for the application.

    Sets turn's text based on the current player.

    Initializes and displays the stage for choosing the starter card.
    void

    Toggles the visibility of the chat pane and updates the button text accordingly.

  • Method Details

    • start

      public void start(javafx.stage.Stage stage) throws Exception
      Initializes and displays the stage for choosing the starter card.
      Specified by:
      start in class GUIController
      Parameters:
      stage - the primary stage for this application
      Throws:
      Exception - if an error occurs during loading or setting up the scene

    • setGuiView

      public static void setGuiView(GUIView view)
      Sets the GUI view for the application.
      Parameters:
      view - the GUIView instance to be set

    • initialize

      public void initialize(URL url, ResourceBundle resourceBundle)
      Initializes the controller upon loading.

      Sets up UI components based on the current player, configures chat options, customizes chat message appearance, and updates the current chat display.

      Specified by:
      initialize in interface javafx.fxml.Initializable
      Parameters:
      url - location used to resolve relative paths for the root object, or null if unknown
      resourceBundle - resources for the root object, or null if there are no resources

    • showStarter

      public void showStarter(PlayableCard card)
      Displays the front and back images of a playable card.
      Parameters:
      card - the PlayableCard object containing information about the card to display

    • sendFront

      public void sendFront(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent mouseEvent) throws IOException
      Sends a message to play the front side of the starter card in the player's hand and handles the card selection.
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the MouseEvent triggered by the user's interaction
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while sending the message

    • sendBack

      public void sendBack(javafx.scene.input.MouseEvent mouseEvent) throws IOException
      Sends a message to play the back side of the starter card in the player's hand and handles the card selection.
      Parameters:
      mouseEvent - the MouseEvent triggered by the user's interaction
      Throws:
      IOException - if an error occurs while sending the message

    • cardChosen

      public void cardChosen()
      Updates the UI after a card has been chosen.

    • setTurn

      public void setTurn()
      Sets turn's text based on the current player.
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if an IOException occurs while sending the message to retrieve available colors

    • addMessageToChat

      public void addMessageToChat(ChatMessage message)
      Adds a message to the appropriate chat and updates the current chat display if necessary.
      Parameters:
      message - the ChatMessage to be added to the chat

    • sendMessage

      public void sendMessage(javafx.event.ActionEvent event) throws IOException
      Sends a chat message based on the user's input and updates the chat.
      Parameters:
      event - the ActionEvent triggered by the user action
      Throws:
      IOException - if an I/O error occurs while sending the message

    • toggleChatMenu

      public void toggleChatMenu(javafx.event.ActionEvent actionEvent)
      Toggles the visibility of the chat pane and updates the button text accordingly.
      Parameters:
      actionEvent - the ActionEvent triggered by the user action
